title: Paraboea regularis
intro: Paraboea regularis is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae, commonly found in Southeast Asia. The plant is known for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may aid in wound healing and the treatment of various infections. Bioactive constituents of Paraboea regularis include paraboeine alkaloids and other compounds that have been reported to exhibit antioxidant and anti-cancer activities. The plant is often used in traditional medicine, with herbal preparations such as teas and infusions being the most common forms used, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential applications.
